name: Devi A
review: I recently visited Tower Place Antarctica with Grand Royal Tour. We are from First Choi... We had an amazing experience with the team. Highly recommended!

name: kumar durai
review: Wonderful organizations for Thailand trip by our guide Mr. Syed bhai, well planned and well coordinated. Every moment was a joy. Thank you Grand Royal!

name: Vasantakumari Babu
review: We had been to Thailand recently through Grand Royal Tours. We had visited Pattaya and Bangkok. The hotels were premium and the food was delicious.

name: Palaniappan Mani
review: Very well organized and executed trips. Good team and good coordination. Really enjoyed our Dubai tour. The desert safari was the highlight!

name: Anitha Raj
review: Our Europe trip was a dream come true. Everything from visas to sightseeing was perfectly handled by the Grand Royal team. Excellent service.

name: Suresh Kumar
review: Professional tour operator. We took the Bali group package and it was worth every penny. The group was fun and the guide was very knowledgeable.
